recommended_new_fields.description: Overall confidence in the structured record based on source quality and consistency.
Confidence that the assigned category, subcategory, and microcategory are correct.
Confidence in pricing truth and plan extraction.
Confidence in compare candidates, alternatives, and competitor graph.
Whether the record is ready to build indexed content pages.
Commercial value proxy for affiliate and buying-intent pages.
QA workflow state such as pending, reviewed, approved, blocked.
Affiliate availability state such as unknown, available, applied, approved, rejected.
Network like PartnerStack, Impact, Rewardful, FirstPromoter, direct.
Canonical affiliate or deep-link URL once approved.
Revenue share, CPA, hybrid, recurring, one-time.
Per-record provenance URLs used for validation and refresh.
Timestamp of the last full human or trusted-system verification.
